2026-06-16T11:10:41.2535325Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2535507Z [36;1m# Write gdb command file.[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2535770Z [36;1m# Uses Python event hooks so that:[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2536171Z [36;1m#   - on a fatal signal  → prints full backtrace and exits gdb with code 1[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2536674Z [36;1m#   - on a clean exit    → exits gdb with the inferior's own exit code[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2537157Z [36;1m# (Plain 'quit' in gdb --batch always exits 0, even after SIGSEGV with nopass.)[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2537593Z [36;1mGDB_CMD_FILE=$(mktemp /tmp/gdb_cmds.XXXXXX)[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2537899Z [36;1mcat > "$GDB_CMD_FILE" << 'GDBEOF'[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2538167Z [36;1mset pagination off[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2538402Z [36;1mset confirm off[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2538632Z [36;1mset print thread-events off[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2538887Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2539078Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2539283Z [36;1m_crash_signal = [None][0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2539520Z [36;1m_inf_exit_code = [0][0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2539756Z [36;1mdef _stop_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2540077Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'stop_signal') and event.stop_signal:[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2540437Z [36;1m        _crash_signal[0] = event.stop_signal[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2540733Z [36;1mdef _exit_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2541071Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'exit_code') and event.exit_code is not None:[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2541445Z [36;1m        _inf_exit_code[0] = event.exit_code[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2541754Z [36;1mgdb.events.stop.connect(_stop_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2542076Z [36;1mgdb.events.exited.connect(_exit_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2542354Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2542559Z [36;1mhandle SIGSEGV stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2542843Z [36;1mhandle SIGABRT stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2543313Z [36;1mhandle SIGBUS  stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2543591Z [36;1mrun[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2543780Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2543968Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2544177Z [36;1msig = _crash_signal[0][0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2544403Z [36;1mif sig:[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2544652Z [36;1m    print("\n\n========== GDB CRASH REPORT ==========")[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2545170Z [36;1m    print("Signal caught: " + str(sig))[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2545509Z [36;1m    print("--- Crashed thread backtrace (full) ---")[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2545845Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2546129Z [36;1m    print("\n--- All threads backtrace ---")[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2546455Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("thread apply all bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2546767Z [36;1m    print("=======================================")[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2547056Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit 1")[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2547460Z [36;1melse:[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2547663Z [36;1m    code = _inf_exit_code[0] or 0[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2547932Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit %d" % code)[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2548177Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-16T11:10:41.2548352Z [36;1mGDBEOF[0m
